mapper.select: select from notice_recipient where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 and deleted_flag = 0 limit 1
select count(1) from notice_recipient where is_deleted = 0 and deleted_flag = 0 and recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} and read_status = 0

select from notice_recipient
order by id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.update: update notice_recipient set read_status = 1, read_at = #{readAt} where is_deleted = 0 and deleted_flag = 0 and recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} and read_status = 0
mapper.insert:
insert ignore into notice_recipient ( notice_id, recipient_user_id, read_status, deleted_flag, is_deleted, remark ) values
( #{item.noticeId}, #{item.recipientUserId}, #{item.readStatus}, #{item.deletedFlag}, #{item.isDeleted}, #{item.remark} )
